linkedin.hook: Your body can only do what your mind lets it.
linkedin.body: mentalIQ is live — 1 hour of mental focus training for sports. Breathing, cue words, routines. The same systems pros use, in a format you can play during pre-game or warm-up. 5-second pauses so you can practice as you listen. Drop a link in comments.

instagram.caption: mentalIQ — 1 hour of mental focus for sports. Breathing. Cue words. Routines. Your body can only do what your mind lets it. Link in bio. 🧠
